nasb.text: Then they captured the king and brought him up to the king of Babylon at Riblah in the land of Hamath, and he passed sentence on him.

esv.text: Then they captured the king and brought him up to the king of Babylon at Riblah in the land of Hamath, and he passed sentence on him.

cnv.text: 他們把王擒住，把他解到哈馬地的利比拉巴比倫王那裡；他就宣判他的罪。

ccb.text: 迦勒底人擒住西底迦，把他押到哈马的利比拉去见巴比伦王。巴比伦王在那里审判他，
